Meta Ads Management

Reach Your Ideal Customers Where They Actually Spend Time

Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram) put your business in front of the right people at the right time.
Most businesses waste money on Meta Ads trying to reach everyone. We target the exact people most likely to buy from you. Every campaign is laser-focused on your ideal customer profile.
Book Your Free Consultation Today
5 Star Client Reviews

Trusted by Small Businesses

63%+

2,000+

Patient Conversions Tracked

*Results from anonymized client case studies. Individual results may vary.

You're Leaving Money On The Table Every Single Day

Right now, your ideal customers are scrolling. They are looking for solutions. And they have money to spend.

The problem? They have no idea you exist.

Meanwhile, your competitors are winning. They are showing up in the feed. They are booking appointments. And you are still relying on referrals alone.

Meta Ads change this dynamic. They put your business in front of your exact profile. Demographics. Interests. Behaviors.

It is like having a smart billboard. It only shows up for people actually interested in your offer.

But here is the catch. Most campaigns waste money on the wrong audience. They use generic creative. And they optimize for engagement instead of revenue.

That's Not How We Do It

Understanding The Business Model

Local MedSpa Achieves 4x Return On Ad Spend

Their Botox ads cost $200 to land a $189 sale. On paper, they were losing money on the first visit and wanted to quit. We dug deeper. We proved that swallowing a small initial loss unlocked the highest retention patients in their database. We stopped chasing cheap leads and started buying high-LTV customers.

Meta Ads That Actually Drive Business Growth

We don't run ads to get likes and comments. We build campaigns that generate qualified leads, booked appointments, and paying customers.

Precision Audience Targeting

We build custom audiences based on your ideal customer profile - demographics, interests, behaviors, location, and more. Then we use lookalike audiences to find thousands of people just like your best existing customers. No wasted spend on people who'll never buy.

Scroll-Stopping Creative

Boring ads get ignored. We create attention-grabbing visuals and copy that stop the scroll and speak directly to your audience's pain points and desires. Every ad is designed to get clicks from qualified prospects, not just passive scrollers.

Conversion-Focused Optimization

We optimize every campaign for what matters most to your business - booked appointments, form submissions, phone calls, or purchases. Not likes, shares, or comments. We track real conversions and constantly adjust targeting and creative to improve your cost-per-lead.

We Don't Chase Vanity Metrics

We Drive Real Business Growth

WHAT'S INCLUDED: META ADS MANAGEMENT

Reach your ideal customers where they scroll and turn attention into appointments

FOUNDATION & SETUP

  • Custom audience research and targeting strategy based on your ideal patient demographics, behaviors, and interests.
  • Complete campaign setup, ad copy, creatives, optimized for conversions
  • Full Meta Pixel setup, conversion API integration, call tracking, and custom reporting dashboards.
  • High-converting landing pages designed specifically for Meta traffic with mobile-first optimization.

ONGOING MANAGEMENT

  • Creative testing, audience refinement, bid strategy management, and budget allocation across placements.
  • Performance reviews with actionable insights, cost-per-acquisition analysis, and creative recommendations.
  • No account managers. You work directly with someone who understands healthcare business operations and compliance.
  • Detailed analysis of what content resonates with your audience, with specific recommendations for future assets.

What Meta Ads Management With Regtek Looks Like

No black-box strategies. No confusing reports. Just clear steps to reach your ideal customers where they scroll.

Discovery & Audience Research

We begin by understanding who your ideal customers are: their demographics, interests, behaviors, and pain points. We analyze your current presence on Meta platforms (if any), study what your competitors are doing, and identify opportunities to reach the right people at the right time.

Creative & Campaign Development

We design scroll-stopping ad creative and write compelling copy that speaks directly to your audience's needs. Then we build strategically structured campaigns with custom audiences, lookalike targeting, retargeting sequences, proper pixel installation, and conversion tracking, all optimized for both Facebook and Instagram placements.

Continuous Testing & Refinement

Meta Ads require constant attention to stay profitable. We monitor performance daily, test new audience segments and creative variations, refresh ads before they fatigue, shift budget to winning combinations, and refine targeting based on real conversion data, not vanity metrics like likes and shares.

Holistic Growth Partnership

You're not just getting an ad manager. You're getting a strategic partner who cares about your entire business. We'll recommend landing page improvements to boost conversions, suggest which services to promote based on seasonality and demand, advise on integrating Meta with your other marketing channels, and help you think through customer acquisition economics and lifetime value.
Book A Free Consultation

Common Questions About Our Meta Ads Management

Meta Ads is the umbrella term for advertising across Meta's platforms (primarily Facebook and Instagram). When we manage Meta Ads for you, we're running campaigns across both platforms, and sometimes Messenger and Audience Network, to reach your audience wherever they spend time. Most people still call it "Facebook Ads," but it's all under Meta now.

Google Ads captures people actively searching for your services right now (high intent). Meta Ads reaches people while they're scrolling social media. They're not actively looking for you yet, but they match your ideal customer profile. Meta is better for brand awareness, visual storytelling, and reaching people earlier in the buying journey. The best strategies use both platforms together.

Most of our clients start with $1,500 to $3,000 per month in ad spend, though we can work with budgets as low as $1,000 per month for smaller businesses testing the waters. Meta Ads typically have a lower cost per click than Google, but may require more touchpoints to convert. During your free consultation, we'll recommend a budget based on your market and goals.

While healthcare is our primary focus and where we have the most proven results, we work with any service-based business that wants data-driven marketing and predictable growth. If you have a clear ideal customer profile and strong unit economics, Meta Ads can work for you.

You'll typically start seeing leads within the first 2 to 3 weeks, but Meta Ads campaigns need 60 to 90 days to fully optimize. The platform's algorithm needs time to learn which audiences convert best for your business. We start with broader targeting, then narrow down as we gather conversion data to improve your cost per lead over time.

Let's Talk Meta Ads

Ready To Reach Thousands Of Your Ideal Customers?

Book a free consultation. No pressure, no obligation. Just an honest conversation about whether Meta Ads is right for your business.

Google Ads Management

Turn Search Traffic Into Paying Customers

Google Ads done right means showing up exactly when your ideal customers are searching.
Most businesses use Google Ads to get more clicks. We use it to grow revenue. Every campaign is built around one goal: turning searchers into customers who actually show up and pay for your services.
Book Your Free Consultation Today
5 Star Client Reviews

Trusted by growing businesses to generate:

63%+

Paid Search Growth

2,000+

Conversions Managed

$100K+

Ad Spend Managed

Most Google Ads Campaigns Are Set Up to Get Clicks, Not Customers

You've built a solid business through referrals and word-of-mouth. When someone recommends you, they show up ready to buy.

But here's the problem: you can't control the flow. Some months are packed. Others are slow. You're at the mercy of your network instead of driving your own growth.

That's where Google Ads come in. The problem is most campaigns are set up wrong from day one. They target the wrong searches and waste budget on people who'll never buy. Traffic gets sent to pages that don't convert. Money gets spent chasing vanity metrics like clicks and impressions instead of actual revenue.

The result? You're paying for activity, not results.

When it's done right, Google Ads become predictable revenue. You control the flow of new customers. You scale when you're ready. You know exactly what you're getting for every dollar spent. No guessing. No hoping your phone rings. Just consistent leads that turn into paying customers.

That's the difference between running ads and running a system that actually grows your business.

No fluff. No waste. Just calls, leads, and customers.

The Results Speak Louder Than We Do

Local Practice Achieves 63% Booking Growth

This podiatry clinic wanted to move beyond referrals. With a strategic paid search campaign, they grew bookings 63%—with Google Ads now driving 169 new patients.

What Google Ads Management With Regtek Looks Like

No black-box strategies. No confusing reports. Just clear steps to get you more patients.

Discovery & Audit

We start by auditing your current setup (if you have one) and understanding your customer demographics and services, current marketing performance, competition in your area, and business goals and constraints.

Campaign Setup & Structure

We build campaigns optimized for how customers search, including service-specific ad groups, location-based targeting, device and time-of-day optimization, conversion tracking setup, and HIPAA-compliant remarketing where applicable.

Ongoing Optimization

We don't "set it and forget it". We provide weekly performance monitoring, bid adjustments based on conversion data, A/B testing ad copy and landing pages, keyword expansion and refinement, and budget reallocation to top performers.

Strategic Consulting

You get more than just ad management. We provide website conversion rate optimization advice, landing page recommendations, patient booking flow improvements, and insights on which services to promote when.
Book A Free Consultation

We Don't Chase Vanity Metrics

We Drive Real Business Growth

Real Campaigns. Real Results.

Podiatry Practice This Year (2025)

Local Practice Achieves 63% Booking Growth

The Challenge

A podiatry practice relying entirely on referrals needed a predictable way to attract new patients, even during seasonal downturns.

The Solution

Built a strategic paid search campaign focused on high-intent keywords, with conversion tracking tied to actual appointments.

The Results
+63% Year-over-year booking growth
169 New patients from paid search
27% Of all bookings now from Google Ads
Dermatology Practice 3+ Years Running

Built a Scalable Patient Acquisition Engine

The Challenge

A Hawaii dermatology practice needed more than referrals to grow. They wanted predictable, scalable patient acquisition that could keep pace with their expansion.

The Solution

Built a paid search system designed to scale delivering consistent new patient flow month after month while maintaining cost efficiency.

The Results
2,350+ New patient leads
$22 Cost per lead
3+ Years of Steady Growth Reliable patient flow that scales with the practice

Common Questions About Our Google Ads Management

You're working directly with me—the founder who's run healthcare operations at scale. No account managers, no junior staff learning on your budget. I bring business strategy consulting alongside campaign management.

Healthcare is my specialty, but I work with any business that values data-driven strategy and measurable results. The same principles apply across industries.

Most failed Google Ads campaigns have the same issues: poor keyword targeting, weak landing pages, no conversion tracking, or unrealistic budget expectations. In your free audit, I'll diagnose exactly what went wrong and whether it's worth trying again.

You'll see data within days, but meaningful results take 60-90 days. Google Ads needs time to learn, and we need data to optimize. Anyone promising instant results is lying. I'll give you realistic timelines based on your industry and budget.

We work month-to-month after initial setup (usually 3 months). If campaigns aren't hitting targets, we adjust strategy or I'll honestly tell you if paid search isn't the right channel for your business. No hard feelings, no long-term contracts.

Yes! I offer website design and CRO services. Often, the issue isn't the ads—it's what happens after the click. I can optimize your entire conversion funnel.

Your Website Might Be Costing You More Than You Think

You've invested in a website. Maybe it looks good, loads fast, and checks all the technical boxes. But here's the hard truth: if it's not converting visitors into leads, it's just an expensive digital brochure.

Most businesses don't have a traffic problem, they have a conversion problem. You're spending time and money driving people to your site through ads, SEO, and referrals. But when they arrive, they bounce.

They don't book. They don't call. They leave and forget you existed.

The issue isn't that your website is "bad." It's that it wasn't built with conversion in mind. Every design choice, every headline, every button placement should be strategically guiding visitors toward one action.

Without that focus, you're leaving money on the table every single day.

The good news? Small, strategic changes can dramatically improve your results.

And that's exactly what we specialize in.

Book Your Free Consultation Today

See Our Projects

MENON MEDISPA
PS DERMATOLOGY
LIMITLESS SPINE & JOINT CARE

We Build Websites That Actually Work For Your Business

Most agencies focus on making things look pretty. We focus on making your phone ring and your calendar fill up.

Conversion-First Design

Every pixel has a purpose. We don't just make beautiful websites—we create strategic experiences that guide visitors toward booking, calling, or buying. Form placement, button colors, headline copy—it's all intentional.

Built on Real Data

We don't guess what works. We use heatmaps, A/B testing, and analytics to see exactly how visitors behave on your site. Then we optimize based on what the data tells us, not what looks trendy.

Continuous Optimization

Your website isn't a "set it and forget it" project. We monitor performance, test improvements, and make data-driven tweaks to keep your conversion rate climbing month after month.

From Healthcare Operations To Digital Marketing

Hi, I'm the founder of Regtek Consulting. Before I ran digital marketing campaigns, I ran operations for a healthcare clinic that grew from a single location to five offices and achieved Inc 5000 recognition.

Here's what I learned during that journey: marketing isn't just about getting clicks. It's about understanding your entire business model, your operations, your capacity, your customer lifetime value, and your growth constraints.

Most agencies don't think about those things. They optimize for conversions without asking if you can handle more customers. They run ads without understanding your margins. They chase vanity metrics instead of revenue.

That's why I started Regtek. To bring operational expertise to digital marketing. To be a true strategic partner, not just an ad buyer.

What I Bring To Your Business

A unique combination of operational experience, digital marketing expertise, and technical skills.

Healthcare Operations Experience

  • Scaled clinic from 1 to 5 locations
  • Achieved Inc 5000 fastest-growing company recognition
  • Deep understanding of medical practice economics
  • Patient lifetime value optimization
  • Operational constraints and capacity planning

Digital Marketing Expertise

  • Google Ads management and optimization
  • Meta Ads strategy and execution
  • Website design and conversion rate optimization
  • Advanced tracking and attribution modeling
  • Multi-channel campaign coordination

Technical Skills

  • Custom domain and email setup
  • Web hosting, security, and SSL certificates
  • Google Business Profile optimization
  • Call tracking and analytics integration
  • HIPAA-compliant marketing infrastructure

Strategic Consulting

  • Business model optimization
  • Pricing strategy development
  • Customer acquisition cost analysis
  • Lifetime value maximization strategies
  • Growth constraint identification and solutions

We Drive Real Business Growth

Most Agencies Sell You Services.
We Build You A System.

Here's how each piece works together to maximize your ROI:

Foundation - SEO & Local Presence

We optimize your website and Google Business Profile for search visibility. More people find you organically when they're looking for what you offer.

Convert Visitors - CRO Optimization

Now that people are arriving, we make sure your website is designed to convert them. Clear messaging, strategic CTAs, and optimized user experience turn visitors into leads.

Scale With Paid Ads

With a converting website in place, we drive targeted traffic through Google Ads and Meta Ads. Every dollar spent brings qualified prospects to pages proven to convert.

Optimize & Repeat

We track every click and call to see who booked and feed that data back to Google and Meta, including dynamic pricing data. The algorithms learn what a valuable customer looks like for you and find more of them.

Each service amplifies the others. SEO brings more traffic. CRO converts more of that traffic. Paid ads scale what's working. Tracking makes everything smarter over time.

This is how you 10x results instead of just seeing incremental gains.

This is an example page. It's different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:

Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin' caught in the rain.)

...or something like this:

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!

content.rendered:
Who we are

Suggested text: Our website address is: https://regtekconsulting.com.

Comments

Suggested text: When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

Suggested text: If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.

Cookies

Suggested text: If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.

If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.

If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.

Embedded content from other websites

Suggested text: Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.

Who we share your data with

Suggested text: If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.

How long we retain your data

Suggested text: If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.

For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.

What rights you have over your data

Suggested text: If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where your data is sent

Suggested text: Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.
